headline: Oil prices rise another 2%, while AI stocks get back to falling
summary: Stocks of computer chip companies and other winners of the artificial-intelligence boom are turning back lower Wednesday and weighing on Wall Street.  Oil prices, meanwhile, rose another 2% as fighting continues in the war with Iran.  The S&P 500 fell 0.2%, even though most of the stocks within it rose.
